name: Guam seed
rationale: HIGH-LEVERAGE SEED RULE: a seed's only direct consumer is Farming; the grimy herb (downstream) carries Herblore. Affects ALL herb/tree seeds.

name: Ranarr seed
rationale: Herb seed -> Farming only; grimy ranarr (downstream) carries Herblore.

name: Limpwurt seed
rationale: Seed -> Farming; limpwurt root (downstream) carries Herblore.

name: Maple seed
rationale: Tree seed -> Farming; maple logs (downstream) carry Fletching/WC+FM.

name: Poison ivy seed
rationale: Already Farming-only in source (supports the seed ruling; plugin was internally inconsistent).

name: Coconut
rationale: DECOMP-EDGE: cracked (no XP) toward coconut milk; coconut milk is the Herblore input. Confirm coconut->Farming only.

name: Pre-nature amulet
rationale: DECOMP-EDGE: unenchanted jewellery (Crafting); the amulet of nature carries Farming.

name: Bird nest
rationale: Egg nest -> bird's egg, offered at WC Guild shrine for Prayer XP. Dropped bogus Fletching. Whole nest family flagged.

name: Bird nest
rationale: Ring nest -> random jewellery loot. Dropped bogus Fletching.

name: Bird's egg
rationale: Wiki-confirmed: offered at WC Guild shrine for 100 Prayer XP. Dropped bogus Fletching + Hunter(source).

name: Bronze nails
rationale: Terminal smithed nail consumed by Construction + brutal-arrow Fletching. Dropped M+S. (Steel nails 1539 re-scan-corrected too.)

name: Rune brutal
rationale: Finished ogre-bow arrow -> Range only (drop Fletching), per finished-ammo precedent.

name: Comp ogre bow
rationale: Finished strung bow -> Range only (drop Fletching), per finished-bow precedent.

name: Verac's helm
rationale: PRAYER-GEAR Q: prayer-bonus melee armour kept Melee+Prayer. Confirm prayer-bonus combat gear should carry Prayer.

name: Initiate sallet
rationale: Prayer-conservation Temple Knight armour; dropped Slayer (popular on slayer but not slayer-specific).

name: White claws
rationale: White Knight set +1 prayer kept Melee+Prayer. The WHOLE white set (~25 items) + fury + initiate hinge on the prayer-gear rule.

name: Amulet of fury
rationale: All-style offensive amulet (+10 attack all styles, +8 str, +5 prayer). Added Range/Mage.

name: Onyx
rationale: Cut gem -> jewellery (Crafting) + onyx bolt tips (Fletching), per cut-gem rule.

name: Obsidian cape
rationale: Pure-defence cape (equal def all styles) -> all 3 combat styles. Fire cape kept Melee (has +str).
comments: Could add to slayer if it fits with other cape rules

name: Ring of stone
rationale: Enchanted novelty disguise ring (turns into a rock). Dropped Mage.

name: Broodoo shield (8)
rationale: LOW CONF: worn shield (25 Magic req, +3 magic attack). Dropped Crafting (finished-armour) + Melee. Confirm Mage vs Melee vs keep. ~24 broodoo variants.

name: Rock-shell chunk
rationale: Raw Fremennik armour material -> Crafting only (the rock-shell helm carries Melee). Applies to all such materials.

name: Oak roots
rationale: Axeman's folly (Cooking) + supercompost (Farming) + crossbow string (Crafting, spun). Wiki-confirmed; fixed bogus Fletching/Herblore.

name: Leaves
rationale: Compost use; dropped bogus Fletching (source mis-tags tree-derived items with Fletching throughout).

name: Teleport crystal (3)
rationale: Charged Lletya/Prifddinas teleport crystal. Dropped Misc.

name: Enchanted lyre(2)
rationale: Reusable Fremennik-province teleport (matches batch-2 enchanted lyre). Dropped Misc/Quests.

name: Ghostly robe
rationale: Magic-bonus fashion set (Curse of the Empty Lord). Dropped Quests (by-function); kept Cosmetics+Mage.

name: Teak pyre logs
rationale: Shade cremation grants Firemaking XP, not Prayer. Dropped Prayer.

name: Thatch spar light
rationale: Tai Bwo Wannai fence-repair pole ('primitive construction'). Dropped Fletching.

name: Proboscis
rationale: LOW CONF: sulliuscep-mushroom injection tool (sulliuscep = a Woodcutting resource). Confirm.
comments: Not a great git because of how niche it is, but it does fit. I would have reluctantly made that call

name: Kelda seed
rationale: Quest-only seed (Forgettable Tale; Kelda chain is quest-only). Quest-only overrides the generic seed->Farming rule.

name: White rose seed
rationale: Garden of Tranquillity quest-only flower seed (no flower-patch use). Dropped Farming.

name: Saradomin brew(4)
rationale: Kept as-is. CONFIRM: should this universal heal/defence PvM potion span all combat tabs (Melee+Range+Mage) not just Melee?
comments: Span all combats styles, put it in all 5 tabs, Herblore, Melee, Mage, Range, Slayer

name: Darklight
rationale: Demonbane melee sword (useful on demon slayer tasks). Dropped Quests (by-function).

name: Archers ring
rationale: DK chase ring; added Slayer to match the other 3 Fremennik rings. CONFIRM: should DK/boss drops carry Slayer (DKs aren't slayer-locked)?

name: Earth warrior champion scroll
rationale: Champions' Challenge minigame scroll (no Slayer-skill involvement). Dropped Slayer (all 11 champion scrolls).

name: Sandstone (1kg)
rationale: Kept M+S. CONFIRM: mined-but-not-smelted rock (ground into sand for glass) -> should it follow the clay/sand precedent to Crafting?
comments: Don't add it to crafting as it's a precursor of an input, not the input itself. This is a gut call

name: Iron spit
rationale: Smithed terminal Cooking tool (cook meat on spit). Dropped M+S per terminal-product rule.

name: Super kebab
rationale: Heals 3+7% HP (<12). Dropped Melee per 12+ rule.

name: Cave eel
rationale: BOUNDARY: heals variable 8-12 (often <12). Treated sub-12: added Cooking, dropped Melee. Confirm.

name: Cooked sweetcorn
rationale: Heals ~10 (<12). Dropped Melee per 12+ rule.

name: Potato with butter
rationale: Heals 14 (12+). Added Range/Mage/Slayer (source only had Melee).

name: Chilli potato
rationale: Heals 14 (12+). Added all combat tabs.

name: Mature wmb
rationale: Brewed ale (not Herblore) boosting Magic. Fixed wrong Herblore->Cooking.

name: Axeman's folly(4)
rationale: Keg of ale boosting Woodcutting. Fixed wrong Farming->WC+FM.

name: Dragon axe
rationale: Woodcutting hatchet (skilling tool + weak weapon). Dropped Melee per skilling-tool rule.

name: Opal machete
rationale: Jungle-cutting (Woodcutting) tool. Fixed wrong Fletching->WC+FM.

name: Onions(1)
rationale: Sack of onions; normalized to match single Onion (Cooking+Farming).

name: Bananas(1)
rationale: Sack of bananas; dropped bogus Hunter, added Cooking (matches single Banana).

name: Yanillian hops
rationale: Brewing hops; normalized to add Cooking (matches other hops).

name: Camo helmet
rationale: Cosmetic Drill Demon reward; dropped bogus Hunter (camo gives no Hunter effect).

name: Flippers
rationale: LOW CONF: underwater-running utility (Mogre drop, not slayer/fishing gear). Dropped Fishing/Slayer.

name: Arena book
rationale: Readable MTA lore book (no function) -> Misc per lore-book rule.

name: Ahrim's hood
rationale: Spot-check: magic head armour (Barrows). No change.

name: Dharok's helm
rationale: Spot-check: melee head armour (Barrows). No change.

name: Air tiara
rationale: Spot-check: infused tiara worn to access the air altar. No change.

name: Mahogany logs
rationale: Spot-check: construction-wood logs (not fletchable). No change.
